defaults.blurb: Course work grouped by assignment type.
defaults.releasePolicy: Release timing is listed in the assignment prompt.
defaults.submissionPolicy: Submission instructions are listed in the assignment prompt.

exercises.blurb: Short applied work to practice weekly concepts with quick feedback.
exercises.submissionPolicy: Submit on Canvas unless the prompt requires a repo link.

in-class-activities.blurb: In-class tasks that reinforce the day’s material.
in-class-activities.releasePolicy: Released at the start of class or activity block.
in-class-activities.submissionPolicy: Submit before class ends unless otherwise noted.

homework.blurb: Longer take-home assignments that synthesize multiple topics.
homework.releasePolicy: Released on the course site and announced in class.
homework.submissionPolicy: Submit through the LMS by the listed due date.
